name: Guacamole Con Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the ripe avocados.
2. Add lemon juice and blend well.
3. Peel, chop, and drain the tomatoes.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes along with remaining ingredients to the avocado mixture.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours if desired.
Serve over chicken enchiladas or as a sauce over any Mexican-style chicken, beef, or cheese dish. Also serve with tortilla chips as a dip.
